'''Jake''' was a large [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mining/Legends|miner]] who worked on [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]].

==Biography==
Jake sold some ancient artifacts to [[Bwahl]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. Bwahl had [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] deliver the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to Jake, but the Hutt didn't send the amount Jake was expecting. When Solo and Chewbacca were ambushed by a group of [[Coway]], Jake was wounded. Solo and Chewbacca proceeded to finish off the ambushers.<ref name="The Essential Guide to Alien Species">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>

[[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later, Jake made advances at [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], provoking a brawl with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. The fight was broken up and the participants placed under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] arrest. [[Grammel]] then poked out one of Jake's [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="Splinter of the Mind's Eye" />
